name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Super Scrcpy

## Summary
Provide a brief summary of the requested feature.

## Problem
Explain the problem or use case that this feature solves.

## Proposed solution
Describe how the feature should work and any relevant details.

## Alternatives considered
If you have other possible solutions, describe them here.

## Benefits
Explain why this feature would be useful and who would benefit from it.

## Additional context
Add any other context, mockups, or references.
